title: Amazing Villagers
description: This modpack adds new villages, new types of villagers, extra trades, and more!
body:
![Amazing Villagers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d5c14921e32dca1ec8c9b1325c090e1eb60dba60.png)

_Prepare to see minecrafts most intresting creature in a new and better way_
![seperater](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2873d0d95bfca6a56bf1e7d76a03e8b4fb8bb510.png) 
### 
### ![feature](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ede41da6388964ab3700448a63298979026aeda2.png)


This modpack adds the following: \
-➕ An item when winning a raid that allows you to have villager discounts when held\
-🎩trading for villager hats\
-🚕better villager transportaion\
-➕your able to trade more before stock runs out\
-🧥villager armor is shown\
-👨‍👩‍👧Villagers now have personality and families\
-🚶Villagers follow emeralds\
-📛Villager have custom names

![seperater](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2873d0d95bfca6a56bf1e7d76a03e8b4fb8bb510.png)
![Q&A](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c74098f841d671fe83c5aa03687607a4ad404908.png)

> **Q:Does _Amazing Villagers_ support multiplayer?**
> **A:** Yes
> 
> 

> **Q: Is there a wiki for more info?**
> **A:** No, but maybe in the future



> **Q: Where to ask for help/bug report**
> **A:** In the [forms](https://forms.gle/HVZgrqNMN2AQZ5nE7)

 ![seperater](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2873d0d95bfca6a56bf1e7d76a03e8b4fb8bb510.png)
![CREDITS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09e959a2be2afa12f8d63b196c9d1241237862ad.png)
